title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 442.370 - When deemed revoked
text:
442.370.  When deemed revoked. — No such letter of attorney, or other instrument, certified and recorded in the manner prescribed in the preceding section, shall be deemed to be revoked by any act of the party by whom it was executed, until the instrument containing such revocation shall be deposited for record in the same office in which the instrument containing the power is recorded.
(RSMo 1939 § 3434) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3047; 1919 § 2206; 1909 § 2817
